rf.t:
射频, 测距计, 测远仪
[计] 射频
rf.d:
n a substance produced by the hypothalamus that is capable of accelerating the secretion of a given hormone by the anterior pituitary gland
n a radioactive transuranic element which has been synthesized
n a complex neural network in the central core of the brainstem; monitors the state of the body and functions in such processes as arousal and sleep and attention and muscle tone

rfa.t: abbr. request for applications 应用要求; radio frequency authorization 无线电频率授权; radio frequency attenuator 无线电频率衰减器; request further airways 要求更远的航线

rfc.t: [计] 电子出版物请发表评论

rfcs.t: ( REQUEST FOR COMMENTS 的缩写,计算机与通讯技术文件)

rfd.d: n free government delivery of mail in outlying country areas

rfdd.t: abbr. restriction fragment differential display 限制性酶片段差异显示

rfe.t: abbr. Radio Free Europe 自由欧洲广播电台

rff.t: abbr. remote fiber fluorimetry 远距离光纤荧光测定法

rfg.t: abbr. reformulated gasoline 重整汽油; refunding 归还; 偿还; roofing 盖屋顶

rfi.t: [计] 射频干扰, 无线电频率干扰

rfid.t: abbr. 无线射频识别（radio frequency identification devices）

rfk.t: abbr. Anguilla; Mississippi 美国; radio frequency keying 射频键控; radio frequency kit 射频（配套）元件

rfl.t: abbr. 无复发活存（Reiter-Feissinger relapse-free survival）；间苯二酚

rflps.t: abbr. Restriction-Fragment Length Polymorphisms 限制片断长度的多态现象

rfo.t: abbr. radio frequency oscillator 无线电频率振荡器; request for factory order 要求工厂定购

rfp.t: abbr. 注册金融策划师（Registered Financial Planner）；征求建议书（Requests for Proposals）；快速充盈期（rapid filling period）

rfps.t: abbr. Royal Faculty of Physicians and Surgeons of Glasgow 格拉斯哥皇家医学系

rfq.t: abbr. request for quotation 请求报价

rfs.d:
n a substance produced by the hypothalamus that is capable of accelerating the secretion of a given hormone by the anterior pituitary gland
n a radioactive transuranic element which has been synthesized
n a complex neural network in the central core of the brainstem; monitors the state of the body and functions in such processes as arousal and sleep and attention and muscle tone

rfu.t: 放射免疫聚焦装置（radiommunofocus unit）

rfwf.t: abbr. radio frequency waveform 射频波形
